dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Take orally once daily with or without food at the same time each day ( 2.1 ). For patients requiring a high-intensity statin or are unable to achieve their LDL-C goal receiving pitavastatin tablets 4 mg daily, prescribe alternative LDL-C-lowering treatment. ( 2.1 ). Assess LDL-C when clinically appropriate, as early as 4 weeks after initiation of pitavastatin tablets, and adjust the dosage if necessary. ( 2.1 ). Recommended dosage is 2 mg to 4 mg once daily.
